Geopolitical tensions (Iran war risk) and rising oil prices typically drive safe-haven demand for gold, outweighing minor economic headwinds like UK wage increases.

The current ranging trend may be broken to the upside due to this geopolitical uncertainty.

The recent news headlines suggest a potential escalation of the Iran war, which could lead to increased risk sentiment and a subsequent flight to safe-haven assets like gold, thus driving up the price of XAU_USD.
